decisionConsistency.justification: Pattern: event-driven. 6/9 sessions consistent. Session 2 did not follow event-driven pattern. Session 6 did not follow event-driven pattern. Session 8 did not follow event-driven pattern.

assumptionHandling.justification: Session 8 explicitly flagged the email-only assumption. Session 9 restructured preferences model for multi-channel. Session 9 implemented preference-based channel routing.

cumulativeRework.justification: 92/3380 lines reworked (2.7%, 22/50). 0/30 files churned (30/30). Late-session rework: 6.1% (3/20).

contextRecovery.justification: Avg context recovery: 34. Session 8: 32 (process:20 efficiency:9 ttfw:3). Session 9: 39 (process:20 efficiency:13 ttfw:6). Session 10: 37 (process:20 efficiency:13 ttfw:4). Session 11: 38 (process:20 efficiency:9 ttfw:9). Session 12: 24 (process:20 efficiency:4 ttfw:0).

finalQuality.justification: Compiles. Tests: 256/256 pass (100%). 5/5 components verified in code. Only one adapter implements an interface. 7/7 components have test files. API consistency: 15/15 (naming=consistent, types=exported, methods=consistent).
